name: Instructions to Post a Blog | openEuler
description: Learn the step-by-step process of posting a blog, from drafting your content to publishing and promoting it.

name: How to Post a Blog on openEuler
description: Learn the step-by-step process of posting a blog on the openEuler community, from account preparation to submitting a pull request.

itemListElement.name: Register an AtomGit account
itemListElement.text: Register an AtomGit account by following the instructions at http://git.mydoc.io/?t=179267.

itemListElement.name: Set your primary email in AtomGit
itemListElement.text: Set your primary mailbox in AtomGit settings at https://atomgit.com/setting/email.

itemListElement.name: Sign your CLA
itemListElement.text: Sign your Contributor License Agreement (CLA) at https://clasign.osinfra.cn/sign/6983225bdcbb19710248ccf0?lang=en.

itemListElement.name: Prepare your git environment
itemListElement.text: Set up your local git environment by following the guide at http://git.mydoc.io/?t=180692.

itemListElement.name: Learn the markdown blog format
itemListElement.text: The openEuler blog is written in Markdown format. Review the blog design at https://atomgit.com/openeuler/openEuler-portal/blob/master/app/en/interaction/post-blog/index.md. Each blog file requires a YAML front matter header with fields: title, date, category, tags, sig, archives, author, and summary.

itemListElement.name: Use the sample blog template
itemListElement.text: Copy the sample post from https://atomgit.com/openeuler/openEuler-portal/blob/master/app/en/interaction/post-blog/blog_example/20220901-sample-post.md to your folder and edit it as a starting point.

itemListElement.name: Fork the openEuler blog project
itemListElement.text: Fork the openEuler portal project to your own AtomGit account. Refer to http://git.mydoc.io/?t=153749 for detailed guidance.

itemListElement.name: Clone the repository
itemListElement.text: Clone the forked repository to your local environment using: git clone https://atomgit.com/<your-atomgit-id>/openEuler-portal

itemListElement.name: Create a new branch
itemListElement.text: Create a new branch for your blog post using: git checkout -b <branch-name>

itemListElement.name: Create your blog folder and file
itemListElement.text: For an English blog, navigate to app/en/blog and create a folder named after your AtomGit ID. For a Chinese blog, use app/zh/blog as your work path. Create your blog markdown file inside this folder.

itemListElement.name: Submit a pull request
itemListElement.text: After writing your blog, commit and push your changes, then submit a pull request to the openEuler portal repository on AtomGit for review.
